stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the meaning of the text below, extracted from ITEM 18 OTHER INFORMATION of an ICAO ATS Flight Plan FPL?

EET/EISN0210

options.a: Crossing EISN FIR boundary after 2 hours and 10 minutes.
options.b: Elapsed time to destination EISN is 2 hours and 10 minutes.
options.c: Estimated elapsed time to EISN is 210 minutes.
options.d: Altitude change as from EISN to Flight Level 210.
